name: codegraph_analyze_impact
description: Predicts blast radius of code changes before making them. USE WHEN: planning refactoring, renaming symbols, deleting code, or assessing risk. Returns: direct impacts (callers, references, subclasses), indirect impacts (2-level transitive), and CROSS-PROJECT impacts (consumers in other indexed projects found via unresolved calls, type references, and #include tracking). Risk level is elevated when cross-project consumers exist. changeType affects analysis: 'modify' shows callers/dependents, 'delete' shows all references that would break, 'rename' shows all sites needing updates. Requires uri and line parameters.

summary.description: Return a condensed summary when many impacts are found

uri.description: The file URI containing the symbol (e.g. file:///Users/me/project/src/main.rs)
